rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0020
rows.name:
You came all the way out here to look for
me, didn't you? I'm impressed, impressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0030
rows.name:
My Doll broke, the Growth attacked
me, and it was a total disaster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0040
rows.name: Come on, Senpai, let's hurry up and go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0050
rows.name:
As an adventurer, it'd be a waste not to
explore a mysterious space like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0060
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Eh? This is no time for that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0070
rows.name:
We're heading back to the big boss
anyway, so isn't it the same either way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33610100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Alright, Senpai, now that it's
decided, let's go! Don't fall behind![ST:wait ]
